description:
2021 Audi RS6, 4.0 TC V8, AWD, 591bhp, 8 Speed Automatic. AED 379,000 or AED 5,938 / Month with 20 % Down Payment over 5 Years. 
 - Mileage only 80,942 KM's - Audi Warranty Valid Until 29th June 2028 - Full Audi Service History - GCC specification - Price includes VAT 
 - Matte Black PPF - Carbon Fiber Exterior - Carbon Fiber Interior - Carbon Ceramic Brakes - Keyless Entry - Keyless Start - Multifunctional Alcantara Steering Wheel - Adaptive Cruise Control - Selective Drive Modes - Voice Control - Electronically Adjustable Seats - Surround View Camera - Heated and Cooled Seats - 4-Zone Climate Controls - Ambient Lighting - Bluetooth Connectivity - Satellite Navigation - Apple CarPlay
